title: Settings
resetConfirm: Reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.

workspace.title: Workspace Paths
workspace.description: Configure where Mission Control stores projects and deliverables.
workspace.basePathHint: Base directory for all Mission Control files. Use ~ for home directory.
workspace.projectsPathHint: Directory where project folders are created. Each project gets its own folder.
workspace.defaultProjectNameHint: Default name for new projects. Can be changed per project.

api.title: API Configuration
api.description: Configure Mission Control API URL for agent orchestration.
api.mcUrlHint: URL where Mission Control is running. Auto-detected by default. Change for remote access.

kanbanUx.title: Kanban UX
kanbanUx.description: Tune board density and lane sizing behavior.
kanbanUx.compactEmptyHint: When enabled, empty Kanban columns shrink to header width while columns with tasks keep a wider, dynamic width.

envVars.title: 📝 Environment Variables
envVars.description: Some settings are also configurable via environment variables in
envVars.precedence: Environment variables take precedence over UI settings for server-side operations.
